products.name: Origin Tee
products.identity: Built for men who keep showing up, even when nothing feels certain.
products.statement: A premium heavyweight tee made with structured cotton for durability and everyday wear.
products.meaning: This piece represents discipline through uncertainty — staying grounded when everything feels off balance.
products.feel: Feels solid, minimal, and dependable. Designed for presence, not attention.
products.close: Part of a rare sourced release. Not mass produced. Chosen with intention.

products.name: Primal Hoodie
products.identity: Built for men rebuilding strength — quietly and intentionally.
products.statement: A heavyweight fleece hoodie made for lasting comfort and quiet confidence.
products.meaning: This piece represents the long work. The effort no one sees. The decision to keep going when it would be easier to stop.
products.feel: Feels grounded, warm, and unhurried. Like the version of yourself that doesn't need to explain.
products.close: Part of a rare sourced release. Limited units. No restocks.

products.name: Source Cap
products.identity: For men who value presence over noise.
products.statement: A structured 6-panel cap made with clean lines and minimal detail.
products.meaning: This piece represents a return to simplicity. Clarity over clutter. Identity without performance.
products.feel: Feels structured and clean. Sits right. No adjustment needed.
products.close: Part of a rare sourced release. Chosen with purpose.
